name: regfind
description: Recursive regex search across a path using grep with line numbers and binary-file suppression. See #assets/payloads/SYSTEM/regfind.
outputs: Searches recursively through the selected path

behavior.validation: Exits with usage text if the regex is missing
behavior.error_handling: Suppresses stderr from inaccessible paths with 2>/dev/null
behavior.safety: Read-only search; does not modify files

notes: Best for fast codebase or filesystem text searches
The default path is the current directory
